title: Ophrys convallarioides
taxonomy: Ophrys convallarioides is a species of orchid in the genus Ophrys, commonly known as bee orchids due to their unique appearance. This plant is part of the Orchidaceae family, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. The Orchidaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Ophrydeae subfamily, to which Ophrys convallarioides belongs. At the species level, Ophrys convallarioides is classified as a member of the Ophrys genus, which comprises around 60 species of bee orchids. The classification of Ophrys convallarioides reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
